author: Pieter
title: Fantastic Customer Service
body:
Yesterday Fatllama (and more specifically Isabella) gave me the best customer service I’ve ever experienced. 

First of all, it was fast and easy to speak to a real life person and no AI bot. With some other companies (or governments) this takes ages or they make you go in circles. 

Then, Isabella acted fast and with a level of empathy and understanding I haven’t encountered before contacting a customer service. 

As a first time lender I made the mistake to refund somebody directly to their bank account. Something went wrong with the kit they hired from me and I wanted to act fast and courteous. As I refunded the whole amount (including booking fee) the payout from Fatllama to me (the total amount minus booking fee) was less then what I refunded. 
I only realised this two days after the renting period was finished and the kit was returned to me.

I explained this all to Isabella and she reassured me they could still do the full refund for the listing from Fatllama, if I was okay to ask (and trusted) the borrower to transfer back the money I send them. 

So, I received great help while it was clearly me who had made the mistake.

Hats off!
reply:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience with us. We’re delighted to hear that Isabella provided such exceptional support and that you felt valued and understood throughout the process.

Providing fast, efficient, and empathetic customer service is something we take great pride in, so it’s truly rewarding to know that Isabella made such a positive impression. Mistakes can happen, and we’re always happy to help find the best possible solution.

We sincerely appreciate your trust in us and look forward to assisting you again in the future.

Best regards,
The Fat Llama-team

author: Shivam
title: Fat llama ALLOWS MINORS to RENT YOUR HIGH VALUE ITEMSBEWARE
body: A kid got verified by fat llama to rent my high value guitar. He made absurd requests and I got a gut feeling so I cancelled it, he then mentioned he is only 17 years old. Isn't it strange that FL is verifying under age members that have no rental history to rent out high value stuff. I contacted FL chat with my booking number but no one responded. Had he stolen my item, the police would have done nothing as he is a minor.
reply:
Thank you for sharing your concerns. We understand that trust and security are paramount when renting out high-value items, and we appreciate the opportunity to clarify our policies.

Fat Llama allows individuals aged 16 and above to rent items, but with strict limitations. Users under 18 are subject to a rental value cap and must successfully complete our verification process, which includes identity checks and other safeguards to confirm their legitimacy. As always, lenders have full discretion to decline a booking if they are uncomfortable, just as you did in this case. If any concerns arise regarding a particular borrower, we encourage lenders to reach out to our team so we can review the request further.

Regarding your support inquiry, we can see that our team did respond to your chat. We regret if you felt your concerns were not addressed in a timely manner, as we always strive to provide prompt and helpful assistance.

Kind regards,
The Fat Llama-team

author: Ergin Balabeyoğlu
title: Unfair Charges for a 4-Hour Delay: My Experience with Fat Llama
body:
I want to share an experience I had today.

I rented a camera through Fat Llama for 2 days, and because I returned it 4 hours late, they charged me £140. The total rental cost was £175, yet for a 4-hour delay, this excessive charge is completely unfair and unreasonable.

They shouldn’t try to take users for fools. This kind of practice damages trust and makes using the platform pointless. I believe they need to correct this mistake.

Just wanted to make others aware.

#FatLlama #UnfairCharges #RentalEquipment #CustomerService #Justice
reply:
Hi Ergin, 

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. 

We just wanted to clarify that you did not have to pay £140 for this late fee. There was unfortunately a clerical error and that was for 4 days which we explained, but the lender wanted to only charge one day of the fee, of which you paid. Thank you for your cooperation in this matter.

We do want to highlight the important of returning items on time, as lenders can miss out on other rentals they have on the day and then lose out further on their earnings. 

We want to thank you for your time and cooperation in this matter.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Rupe Patel
title: Great idea - poor execution
body: Great idea, but the phone verification system does not work, awaiting sms, nothing and on screen box is blank. Tried contacting the 'team' via chat, finally got thru to someone, explained that their phopne verification system was not sending out the PIN no. and waited and waited! V V poor execution
reply: Hi, for most people the phone verification works well. We recommend using a UK, US or CA phone number for maximum reliability. Please contact info@fatllama.com again if you need more help. Kind regards, Henrik

author: Monet Michaela Higgins
title: Terrible safeguarding with honest customers
body: Honestly. If there was an option to rate FatLlama and it’s seller’s a 0– I would. I regret not reading the reviews before my second attempt to renting out equipment from a seller. WARNING, do not rent from sellers with bad or no ratings. Both sellers promised to adhere to terms and conditions and politely arranged and accepted my money—in which Fat Llama are holding, to then end up, cancelling the booking on the day of when equipment was needed. Now I am out of pocket TWICE. Why is there no precaution for incidents like this? Now my moneys somewhere in air.. and I’m without a rental camera. FatLlama is supposed to provide certainty for renters/buyers like me. Otherwise what’s the point?
reply:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience and completely understand how frustrating it must be to have two bookings cancelled at the last minute. This is certainly not the experience we want our borrowers to have.

While the vast majority of rentals go through smoothly, we regret that you’ve had the misfortune of encountering two cancellations. As Fat Llama is a peer-to-peer platform where private individuals rent out their own items, unforeseen circumstances can sometimes lead to cancellations—though we actively monitor lender behaviour to prevent repeat occurrences without valid reasons.

Please rest assured that in cases where a lender cancels, a full refund is always issued. If you have not yet received your funds, we encourage you to reach out to us at info@fatllama.com, and we’ll be happy to look into this for you.

We appreciate your feedback and are continually working on ways to reduce last-minute cancellations and improve reliability for borrowers. If there’s anything further we can do to assist, please don’t hesitate to get in touch.

Kind regards,

The Fat Llama-team

author: Rafz
title: I wouldn’t give these guys one star
body:
I wouldn’t give these guys one star, absolutely crap of platform. Gave them My ID as verification, my bank statement they accepted that perfectly fine. Now to the most idiotic thing I’ve ever come across. They have to have your social links to determine your “ profession experience with the item “ what is this bullcrap. How does this company still operate like this. 

Hi there,

I do understand that the verification process can be a bit intense and really appreciate your cooperation. Because we do not require cash deposits as traditional rental houses do, this does mean that our system has to have sufficient information to verify the trustworthiness of all our borrowers. With socials we check if you have proffessional experience with the items.

You guys decide

author: James Peek
title: Always a perfect service with no…
body: Always a perfect service with no complaints! Use Fat Llama a lot for my work and it is perfect!

author: Alessandra Pisi
title: Fat Llamas share information ...not!
body: I have been wanting to use Fat Llama for a while. I booked a lens I wanted to try on a photoshoot. I paid for the hire. Then the nonsense begins. I don't drive I never have. I need to renew my passport, I'm a few years younger, but it's expired so no Fat Llama for you! I had this conversation a few years ago. If I can vote with an expired passport, I can rent from your company. I wonder how long they will keep my £35 hire fee. Just gormless corporate ID scavenging, upload your id, council tax bill and social media presence, while they squat in some anonymous tax haven hiding their data and profits.

author: Alexandru Claudiu
title: Make your gear work for you and your career!
body:
It's an easy way to earn some extra cash for your gear. I've got an account on Fatllama for more than 4 years now during this period I've built connections and friendships with fellow creators. 
Highly recommend!
reply:
Hello Alexandru, 

Thank you so much for sharing your positive experience of our platform. Happy to hear that you have been using Fat Llama for more than 4 years and built connections and friendships. 

Best regards,
Fat Llama

author: Ritesh Chawla
title: Avoid using this service
body: Really bad service wanted something higher they're verification just kept on and on sent so many documents they just don't know what they're doing. Ask me my Facebook profile. I've got more than 4 1/2 thousand contacts still didn't get accepted then asking my LinkedIn one I've got more than 2 1/2 thousand followers still didn't get accepted. It's just a joke. It just really really frustrating. I would never recommend using this if you ar looking for something last minute because I only had three days and it because it is really really frustrating.
reply:
Hi Ritseh,

We're really sorry you've had this experience using Fat Llama. 

Unfortunately it looks like you have tried to rent a very high value amount of kit for the first time at 7pm the day before you wanted to pick the item up at 9am the next day. The managers who verify high value kit leave at 6pm each day and therefore we advise people to request high value kit at least 24-48 hours in advance. We'd be happy to verify you in the future for these rentals but we do need some more time for high value last minute requests. We hope you can understand and have the confidence to use Fat Llama in the future.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

author: William Bell Horus
title: terrible customer service
body: Great experience with the hirer - however customer service is 0 out of 5 they literally don't get back to you about anything if there is any form of request.
reply: We are sorry to hear about your experience with our customer service, and we appreciate your feedback. We’re actively working to improve our response times and overall service, and we hope to provide you with a much better experience next time. In the meantime, if there is anything we can assist you with, please do not hesitate to reach out.

author: Charles Ryder
title: what at first seems like a great idea…
body: what at first seems like a great idea can slowly turn into a headache.i was hoping to hire a camera and a lens which was cheaper than hireacamera or the like .the problem came when it came to verification passport/driving licence and utility bill no problem but you have to be on Facebook or the like .well im 54 and am not into social media or the like so no hope.how can this be a reliable form of verification when anyone can create a social media account.only pro rental places for me now.at least you can talk to who your hiring from first.
reply:
Hi Charles,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry you had this experience with us when making this high value rental. As we do not work like traditional rental houses we need to ask for more verification and once thats done, you do not have to be verified again in that way.

We're happy to help you through your verification to rent higher value rentals if you'd like to contact us.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Sian Herbert
title: The best and most affordable service for renting equipment
body: Ive been using FatLlama for a year now - to rent my music kit out, and also to rent music, lights, and photography kit for events. It’s such a great service - my very expensive DJ controller has almost paid for itself now. We have also hosted events with incredible lighting i could never afford to rent from anywhere else. I feel safe with FatLlama as I know that if there was ever damage, it would be covered by their insurance. High recommended
reply:
Hello Sian, 

Thank you so much for sharing your positive experience of the platform. We are happy to hear that your DJ controller has almost paid itself now and that you have hosted events with lighting rented from us. 

We are glad that you feel safe and supported to rent via our platform. Your feedback means a lot to us, and we are excited to continue being part of your events and equipment rentals.

Best regards,
Fat Llama

author: Sam
title: Fat Llama was so helpful in a pinch
body: I was in desperate need for some tables and chairs for an event I was running and the app was a lifesaver. It was really simple to use and I could quickly see lots of different options for hiring the equipment. I sourced the tables and chairs I needed from a lender 5 minutes drive away and they were very responsive and offered a great price. The app is easy to navigate and I'd recommend it to anyone looking for short term equipment rentals.
reply:
Hello Sam,

Thank you so much for your excellent feedback! We are so glad to hear that Fat Llama was able to help you get the tables and chairs for the event and that they were conveniently located nearby. It’s great to know that the app was easy to navigate and that you found great options at a good price.

Your feedback means a lot to us, and we’re excited to continue supporting you with any future rentals. Don’t hesitate to reach out if you need anything. 

Best regards,
Fat Llama

author: A
title: Worst customer service
body: someone left a review saying the whole place is run my hormonal teenagers and I couldn’t agree more. Rude service avoid.
reply: We are truly sorry to hear about your experience with our customer service, and we appreciate your feedback. Providing high-quality service is very important to us, and we’re continuously working to improve. Thank you for helping us get better, and we hope to provide you with a much better experience in the future.

author: Robin
title: Item Damaged and Compensated
body:
I have to give Fat Llama and their team a massive thank you. My ProFoto B10 was damaged by a renter who denied any wrongdoing.

Fat Llama paid for all the repairs and was very patient. The entire process of having it repaired due to sourcing parts from abroad took over a month. 

This experience has restored my trust in lender protection and putting up expensive equipment for rent.

One thing to note, it took some time to initially hear back from Fat Llama about the damage when it happened. That is one point to improve upon. It was about a week until Fat Llama responded and I had a damaged light I couldn't use.
reply:
Hello Robin, 

We are so happy to hear about your positive experience and thankful for sharing it. Glad that your ProForo B10 repairs were paid and the process was smooth. 

Thank you for the feedback and for getting a quicker response, we are improving our service continuously, which is why your improvement idea is highly appreciated. 

Best regards, 
Fat Llama

author: Peter Ford
title: No Map? - Woefully bad downgrade to their website…
body:
Woefully bad downgrade to their website and app.

Theyve taken away the ability to search via a map, to see where items you want to rent are.

Imagine if Air BnB or IUber did this? 

It makes it really tricky to actually find an item you want to rent, in a convenient location, - which really makes the whole thing quote broken to use
reply:
Hello, 

Good news—we've added the map search back! We apologize for any inconvenience caused while it was unavailable, and we appreciate your feedback, which helps us improve. Thank you for your patience, and we hope this update enhances your experience. 

Best regards,
Fat Llama

author: Sam Bignell
title: Dreadful, redesign...
body:
The latest redesign is so dreadfully awful, I don't even consider fat llama as an legit option today and haven't since the redesign. However, dreadfully reminded of what was once a very good service. 

Previously you used to be able to see all related items and their rough location around you, making it easy to visualize distance and plan if an item might be on route or at your destination.

That has all been removed. Everything is for some reason stuck in kilometers and there is no way to figure out easily and quickly how out the way an item might be to rent.

It is utterly painful to use, Having to click on each item individually, copying the Rough location in Google maps to figure out where in the heck half the items are that I might be able to rent...
reply:
Hello,

We’ve reintroduced the map search feature to make it easier to see related items and their locations. We’ve been working hard on improving the redesign and have already made several updates based on user feedback.

We truly appreciate your input. It is important in helping us continue to make our service better. If there is anything else we can assist you with, please let us know. We hope to provide a better experience for you. Thank you for sharing your feedback. 

Best regards,
Fat Llama

author: HendKarim Amed
title: The website is easy to use
body: The website is easy to use, the experience overall is very nice.
reply:
Hello HendKarim, 

Thank you for sharing your positive experience of the platform. We are glad to hear that everything went smoothly and overall experience was very nice. We appreciate this a lot! 

Best regards,
Fat Llama

author: Luke Skywalker
title: They've completely lost their way! :(
body:
Firstly, I have been a loyal FatLlama user for many years. HOWEVER, a few recent experiences have turned me off them completely. Their service used to be flawless and had a really stellar community vibe to it. But now it seems they are just ruthlessly profiteering with no interest in their customers at all. They favour large rental companies and not independent peer-to-peer users. 
When you search for an item you are bombarded with listings that say they are local to you, but actually turn out to be a big company miles away that you can't even visit. It's almost impossible to find genuine local renters anymore. They "updgraded`' their website and user experience recently and it's been nothing but the opposite. Catastrophically bad. Maybe they have new management or investors that are hell bent on destroying the brand. Either way it's utterly puzzling how bad they've become.

I also had a troublesome experience with regards to a rental never being returned. When I eventually got a response from their team via email. The tone of the email was rude, condescending and certainly not friendly. It's like the whole place is being run by hormonal teenagers!

I used to recommend them to all my peers. Sadly, I will not be recommending them at all in anyway unless they drastically change immediately. For now at least; AVOID!
reply:
Hello,

I am sorry to hear about your experience with the platform. We’ve reintroduced the map search feature to make it easier to find items, along with other general improvements to improve the overall user experience. Our focus remains on providing a great service, keeping the community vibe, and prioritizing local, independent users.

I hope these updates help improve your experience, and we’d love to earn back your trust and loyalty, especially after your long history with us and your previous recommendations.

Thank you for your feedback, and please don’t hesitate to reach out if there’s anything else we can assist you with.

Best regards,
Fat Llama

author: David BRILL
title: Insurance Cover
body:
I had been with Fat Lama since 2017 and everything till now has gone well. 
Recently however I have had an awful experience with two pieces of equipment being rented and not returned. The hirer was approved by Fat lama . 
The replacement value I received in the end did not cover the cost of both items.
 I am not going to go into figures but please note if you are renting out equipment that has increased in value over the years eg old cameras , microphones you will not receive the true value of the equipment Or it’s replacement value 

Their policy I quote is :

4.1. We will pay for the cost of repair, replacement value, or the original value with any item depreciation applied, whichever is less. The ‘original value’ is determined by the price you paid for it and must be evidenced by you (e.g. with a proof of purchase). Depreciation is determined by the Claims Team.

They also add a  depreciation of 6% per year Please consider this thoroughly before joining.
The whole experience was very up setting to the extent that it has taken me this long to write about it.

I have as a result closed my account with Fat lama. 

David

author: Mr. Özkök
title: Major Disappointment with the New Fat Llama App Update
body:
I am deeply disappointed with the recent overhaul of the Fat Llama website and mobile app, which has substantially degraded the user experience. Previously, the platform was a model of user-friendly design—intuitive, straightforward, and visually appealing, making the equipment rental process seamless and enjoyable.

However, the latest update has introduced a confusing, cluttered interface that complicates navigation. More frustratingly, the pricing system seems flawed. For example, a simple one-day equipment rental from Monday to Tuesday, which previously counted as a single day, is now inexplicably billed as two days. This not only affects affordability but also transparency in pricing.

Additionally, the removal of the interactive map—a key feature that allowed users to visually locate and select equipment—has stripped away a crucial tool for efficient browsing and selection.

This update feels like a step backward and significantly tarnishes the brand’s reputation. I urge the Fat Llama team to reconsider these changes and restore the functionality and simplicity that made their platform a preferred choice for users like myself.

author: Dean
title: Website upgrade is a serious downgrade
body:
The new desktop and mobile phone app upgrade is horrendous, a total downgrade and is shocking!

Their previous app was amazing, simple to use with a clean clear welcoming design, making your rental procedure easy and straight forward. 

What they have designed now is poorly designed, along with an incorrect quotation system when booking equipment, for example, i booked some equipment for a 1 day shoot, collect on a Monday to drop back on a Tuesday, on the old system that is a one day booking - on the new system that very same booking is now charging for two days?!?

They have also gotten rid of the interactive map feature that displays the available equipment when you move around on the map. 

What they've done to their brand is totally upsetting, i write this as my first review outside of the platform in a hope that they read this, get their act together and sort their platform out!

author: Adam
title: Awful
body: Awful service. When I tried to get help, the team didn't have a clue what they're doing and actually made matters worse. Absolute mess, avoid.

author: maciej Maciej
title: Scam
body: Don’t waste your time and money
reply:
We’re sorry to hear that you feel this way. Our aim is to provide a safe and reliable platform for our users. If you’ve experienced any issues, we’d like to understand what happened and see how we can help.

Please reach out to us at info@fatllama.com with more details so we can look into this matter and work towards a resolution.

Kind regards, 
Fat Llama

author: Ana
title: Awful experience
body:
I recently rented out my camera on Fat Llama, and unfortunately, the experience was far from satisfactory. The renter failed to return the camera on time, despite agreeing to return it the day after pickup. I promptly raised a dispute with Fat Llama, and they assured me they would contact me within 48 hours. However, I never received any communication from them during this critical period.

Thankfully, the renter eventually returned the camera four days late. Nonetheless, the lack of support from Fat Llama during this stressful situation was extremely disappointing. Their customer service was unresponsive when I needed them most, and this experience has left me wary of using their platform again. When you need them, they are simply not there for you. I cannot recommend Fat Llama based on this experience.

UPDATE ON 30/07:
Still Fat Llama did not bother getting in touch
reply:
Hi Ana,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We wanted to point out that the case was reported on the 21st July, and we sent an email on the 23rd of July and also the 25th. It looks like the emails were not reaching you which was unfortunate. Once a case is reported the renters account is suspended and we try and chase them as much as possible. We're really happy you got your item back and hope you have the confidence to use Fat Llama again.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Zubair Taqi
title: What made my experience great?
body:
What made my experience great? It's Louise. She was so great and she even wait for everything.
I'm lucky to born in this era where these apps are heaven.

author: Naomi Omokhua
title: Worst customer service ever
body:
I don't think I have seen customer service this bad.
They are truly the worst ! They take over a day to verify your documents but take money immediately.
the verification process is so ridiculous. Why must I verify every time I book ?? 
They never used to be this bad.

author: Sabrina Roberts
title: Great!
body: Louise was great and so easy to work with through the verification process.

author: Alex Forsey
title: Waste of time I tried to rent but…
body: Waste of time I tried to rent but verification took tool lomng after I've used many times. Not impressed had to cancel rental.

author: Mi
title: STAY AWAY!!!
body: STAY AWAY!!!! I'm convinced THESE ARE FAKE POSITIVE REVIEWS, SENT SOO MUCH PERSONAL INFO AND WITH AN EXCELLENT CREDIT SCORE THEY WASTED MY TIME. STILL AWAITING THEM TO RESPOND....

author: L
title: Avoid. The verification process is out of control.
body:
I've been using Fat Llama for many years, since it started.. But in the past year or so at least, their verification process has spiralled out of control.

Today it has taken them over 7 HOURS (so far) of my valuable time to verify me. This puts the whole point of my rental, and project, in jeopardy as my rental is supposed to start now. 

Yet they have my money.

I was already verified, but because I passed a new value threshold on my rental (about 4k), I was asked to re-verify everything. 

This is after booking, communicating with the other user, and PAYING.

Unphased, I sent bank statements as requested (which were rejected for being old, even though they are from the past week), I sent utility bills, I sent payslips, I sent a passport, all via a new 'improved' app which would constantly return errors.

Eventually, after having my documents vaguely rejected multiple times, I resorted to the 'live chat', which redirects you to a FAQ script. 

After managing to find an email address, I requested a call, and was told hours later on the phone that I also needed to submit a social media portfolio! 

I don't use social media, and so in lieu of that I was asked to send 'correspondence from your client'... for what reason, I still do not know. I sent that immediately, and now, at almost 7pm, I am still awaiting verification.

The phone number does not receive incoming calls, and the 'live' chat isnt live. The closing time for their office is reported as 5pm, 6pm, and 7pm in different parts of the website.

The whole thing is a complete shambles and as a long term user of their service i expected a little better.

Avoid if you can. I will in future.
reply:
Hi Luke,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry you had this experience with us when making this high value rental. As we do not work like traditional rental houses we need to ask for more verification and once thats done, you do not have to be verified again in that way.

We're happy to help you through your verification to rent higher value rentals if you'd like to contact us, we can see you've been using us recently so thank you for your continued support.

Just to confirm, our hours vary on the weekend and management hours also vary. Customer service is open from 8am-7pm Mon-Sat and 8am-4pm Sunday.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: B.B. Manik
title: Terrible customer service
body: Terrible customer service (for an issue that still hasn’t been resolved). They’re happy to take your money, but you won’t hear from them when you need help. Appalling.
reply:
Thank you for sharing your experience, and I sincerely apologise for the inconvenience you’ve faced. We understand how frustrating it is when you need help and don’t receive a prompt response.

Unfortunately, a recent platform update led to a surge in support requests, which affected our response times. This is not the standard of service we aim to provide, and we are working hard to resolve all outstanding issues as quickly as possible.

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

author: Jonas Leskevicius
title: Really unreliable
body:
Really unreliable. Slow at replying and verifying documents. 

Ask for the same documents twice, delay rentals and cancel in a very random way. 

I had a rental approved then I had to cancel to exchange for a slightly different rental, which fatllama refused. 

I was also in a rush because I had an event in the evening, but they couldn’t verify my order until it was wayy too late. 

I didn’t have issues using fatllama before, but it seems something changed within their services recently. 

Don’t trust them for last minute help EVER
reply:
Hi Jonas,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We're really sorry you have had this experience, we do tend to advise people get their rentals sorted and booked at least 24 hours before you need the item, so that we can help you through the verification process. Sometimes this is a big longer due to the value of the item, we need more information depending on the item and how much it is. Whilst we strive to do this as fast as possible, we have less staff outside of business hours and things are slower in the evenings and on weekends. Once you are verified though, the process speeds up and you shouldn't have any issues in the future.

Please see our FAQ's on our website for further information about how and why we verify.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: G.E.
title: Proactive Customer Service
body: I signed up to Fat Lama first time today because I needed a piece of equipment urgently for tomorrow. I didn't realise (but of course this has to be in place) that there is a verification process for new accounts and it takes time for them to be reviewed. I was nearing the pickup time and kept refreshing to see if verified. I then e-mail customer service to beg them to review my account immediately if possible so I can pick up the equipment in literally 1 hour. To my delight they replied right away and actioned my request. My account was reviewed and I now have what I need for tomorrow. How lovely is that!! Customer service like this makes a difference between a good company and an exceptional one! Big thanks to Linn from customer service!! :)

author: Simply VFX
title: Appalling customer service
body: Appalling customer service, almost non-existent support for customers and renters. They just ignore you, hold up confirmation without explanation, and charge exorbitant fees all in the name of 'protecting the renter.' However, all it does is cost us money—over £500 in lost rental income to date because of this mess of a company.
reply:
Thank you for sharing your feedback, and we are truly sorry for your experience. We did face an overwhelming number of support cases following platform changes this summer, combined with a temporary shortage in staff, which unfortunately impacted our response times.

We understand how frustrating this has been and are committed to improving. Our goal is to provide the best possible support for all users, and we hope to demonstrate this in your future interactions with us.

Kind regards, 
Fat Llama

author: Andrew
title: Louise provided the best experience I’ve ever had!
body: I had a wonderful experience with Louise. She was very attentive, caring and genuinely interested in helping me today throughout the entire process. It’s a shame I could only give 5 stars, she really deserves more!

author: Earl Duncan
title: Crap customer support!
body:
Crap customer support. They cancelled my already verified purchase then when I resubmitted the docs - nothing.

Now the window of time to collect the item I needed for the shoot I have tomorrow is passed. It makes no sense, I already rented something from them today, was already verified today so what's the damn issue. 

Now I've lost money, and have to cancel the shoot and I'm just overall pissed. You can't even call anyone in their office - it's BS.

Thanks for nothing.
reply:
Hi Earl,

Thank you for your review.

It looks like the day after this review was made, you were able to pick the item up. We're sorry you did not have a good experience at the time but we always try and rectify any issues through our Customer Service team, which may have been what has happened here.

Any further feedback please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly.

Best Regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Rhys williams
title: useless support very poor website
body: useless support very poor website and app, when i explained this to customer support they closed my account. shows how poor a company is when they dont even reply to these commets, good or bad
reply:
Hi Rhys,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review.

We're sorry this has happened and we would be happy for you to contact us to give a more detailed reason as to why your account was closed. We've updated the web and app to provide better customer service and we're sorry it's taken a while to get back to you. Please email resolutions@fatllama.com for us to discuss further.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: C B
title: Time Wasters
body:
- bad customer service
- unnecessarily lengthly verification process
- arbitrary value limits on rentals which do not make sense and are not explained

Don't waste your time.
reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We wanted to let you know that our unique verification system is different to most rental houses, as we do not take a cash deposit - so we manually review some higher value rentals. We're sorry you did not get approved this time round.

If you would like a more detailed response as to your personal verification please email security@fatllama.com and we will be able to help.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: David O
title: Just useless
body:
Just useless. Website frequently doesn’t work, the app is terrible and the support if a rental goes wrong is non existent. 

Add to that a 25% fee for the lender AND a 25% fee for the borrower. 

Fat Llama are a middle man and a greedy and useless one at that
reply:
Hi David,

We're really sorry you had a bad experience on the web and app a few months ago. We've recently updated both the web and the app and have been optimising this for the past couple of months. We really hope that if you use Fat Llama again you will see its benefits. We've had the fees set at this amount for some time now and it's how we're able to sustain our business and give you the best service we can. We do hope you'll be able to come back and see this in action.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: customer
title: Website a bit iffy but idea great
body:
The website link I was sent by fat llama failed to get through to this page, which is indicative of the fat llama web site, a bit buggy. 
Otherwise it's a great idea to borrow tools etc. from local people.

author: Ed Star
title: I can only assume these reviews are…
body:
I can only assume these reviews are fake.

This is truly horrendous service, run entirely by clunky algorithm with zero customer service. Having already paid for service I have been unable to pass verification despite proving proof o f payment, official documents (passport and DL), and social media verification.

The information requested exceeds what can be reasonably requested under GDPR , and I expect this is data capture trap as much as it is peer to peer lending service. 

The complaint service is run by a chat bot, which is constitutes a serious breach of statuary/consumer rights. 

I will not only be going to financial ombsuman, but referring this to correct authority for possible data fraud.
reply:
Hi Ed,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We wanted to let you know that our unique verification system is different to most rental houses, as we do not take a cash deposit - so we manually review some higher value rentals. We're sorry you did not get approved this time round. We do have a dedicated customer service team and multiple emails you can reach out to us on if you needed help with anything. We'd love to see what we could do for you if you wanted to rent again, so please email resolutions@fatllama.com.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama team

author: Francis Boyter
title: Absolutely useless and broken on both…
body: Absolutely useless and broken on both the web version and the app... and then they charge you for having such a bad service.
reply:
Hi Francis,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We're really sorry you had a bad experience on the web and app a few months ago. We've recently updated both the web and the app and have been optimising this for the past couple of months. We really hope that if you use Fat Llama again you will see its benefits. As always if you have any further feedback on this please email info@fatllama.com.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Jack Macaulay
title: A near perfect platform!
body:
It's taken me forever to take the plunge and list my items for rental on FatLlama but having done it last week, I've already had two rentals and the process has been near seamless.

The only main issue is the app seams to be rather basic. There's no real settings and a major flaw seems to be the lack of notifications for messages? Maybe I'm missing something but they'll text you (constantly) to remind you you have unread messages but even clicking the link in that text leads you to the website - feels like they're missing a trick in making the app more useable (but maybe majority of use is on desktop and I'm an outlier).

Anyway, apart from that, really great concept and seems to be executed well. Look forward to using it more!

author: Michelle
title: Poor customer service.
body:
I rented a camera from a lender. The camera wouldn’t work, good thing I tested it before going for this major filming event. I immediately notified the lender and she apologised, I returned the camera and cancelled the rental with Fatllama.

First they gave me the 48hr cancellation rule, as this was less than 48h and reason for cancellation genuine.
I contested and they required evidence of communication with lender which I sent and lender even confirmed the cancellation.

Fat llama still haven’t paid my refund despite even the lender emailing them again confirming cancellation.

Disappointed by this fat llama.
reply:
Hi Michelle, 

I'm so sorry to hear about this situation! If the camera wasn't fit for purpose, then you'll be entitled to a refund for sure. We're training up some new folks on support at the moment, and it sounds like someone might have been confused with how to process this case. I do apologise! 

If you haven't already, please contact our Resolutions team at Resolutions@fatllama.com, and one of our dedicated case managers will get this sorted out for you.

Thanks,
The Fat Llama Team

author: Benjamin Youd
title: Brilliant service, which I have full confidence in!
body: I've been using Fat Llama for several years now, with complete confidence in their service and support. Over time, they have continued to refine the way they work, which has only given me more confidence that they care about what they're doing. Such a great, and important service — sharing items is SO much better than buying them!

author: DARIO DI GIOVANNI
title: The app doesn't work and the commission…
body: The app doesn't work and the commission they charge is insane
reply:
Hi Dario di Giovanni, 

I'm sorry to hear you're unhappy with our Fat Llama fees. Unfortunately, we have found that the rates we charge are what is necessary to be able to maintain the platform and offer the security of thorough account verification and our Guarantee for our users' protection -- at rates that are still usually lower than traditional rental houses!

In terms of the app, our engineers are hard at work on some major improvements that we'll be rolling out in upcoming months. I hope you'll be willing to give us another chance! 

All the best, 
Fat Llama Team

author: customer
title: Top Notch Customer Support
body: Fat Llama's customer support team were quick to respond and solved the issue in minutes, really impressed! I've been on this platform since 2017 and often recommend it to clients, friends & family.

author: Ordinary Zine
title: The customer service is awful
body: The customer service is awful, beware. No phone number - instant red flag. Prepare for all your emails to be ignored or answered by bots (or if they are people, they can’t read and consistently miss the point).  Waited over an hour for live chat and even then they replied and took 20 minutes to continue responding. They never apologised for any inconvenience and honestly it didn’t sound like a real person on the other side of the chat! Sketchy vibes.
reply:
Hi Ordinary Zine, 

I'm sorry to hear that you've experienced difficulties getting support on the platform! As a small team fielding a huge number of account verifications and queries, we are unfortunately not able to offer phone support. However, I'm happy to say that we're currently in the process of training up some additional teammates and undertaking some significant internal changes to be able to offer quicker, more thorough instant chat and email support going forward. I hope you'll give us another chance!

Best, 
The Fat Llama Team

author: Alisia Green
title: Awful service, poor communication
body:
Very poor communication and service. Impossible to get in touch with a human. The verification process is a nuts , which I understand from security perspective is essential. But when you submit all the information about your identity, company , card details , etc  it’s still not verified. 
They have let me down twice. Very disappointed with them. I do not recommend using them. Waste of time, energy. 
They say verification process takes from 10 minutes up to 1 hr , but in my case it’s a 3 day and still no luck. 
Awful service!
reply:
Hi Alisia,

Thank you for taking the time to leave your review. 

Our verification process is a unique one, and we do take a payment before we verify people. This payment is only held and is immediately refunded if the person is not verified or needs to cancel for whatever reason. Please see our FAQ on how verification works: https://fatllama.crisp.help/en/article/how-does-verification-work-1xsutcp/

For first time renters renting higher value items, we do require more information than normal rental houses (who take a deposit, whereas we do not). Depending on how busy we are and the date of the rental, the verification may take slightly longer and we always advise people to book in advance.

We'd love to help you out for future rentals, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Angela
title: Good app easy to use would recommend 👍
body: Good app easy to use would recommend 👍

author: Andrius Solopovas
title: Very poor service
body:
Very poor service ! 
Fat Lama put me down twice just because they can not verify my identity/ account despite that all my company /personal  & employee information is available online. 
I have spent twice 2 days trying to resolve the issue , but they simply don’t care. Their policy stating that verification takes from 10 minutes up 1 hr, which is not true. Communication is very poor and slow. 
Such a waste of time. They take your money first , then when your account taking time to be verified and still do not verified , you have to spent another few hours to write them emails to ask for a refund, because they simply letting you down just because the service is so slow with the verification.
When finally someone get in touch  with me with that  verification have been confirmed and that my account is now available to rent , I made an attempt to rent a lense for my project. They have  cancelled and made account is again pending for approval. Simply with no explanation and no reason. 
I do not recommend using them. What a shame and poor service .
Very disappointed and won’t recommend them to anyone.
reply:
HI Andrius, 

I'm sorry to hear that you've had frustrating experiences with our verification process! While the majority of our rentals are verified within a few minutes to an hour, I can see that you were renting professional-grade equipment, which unfortunately does often take longer due to the value and security factors. The good news is that now that you've passed verification and completed a rental, it will be much quicker to rent the next time you need something. 

All the best,
Fat Llama Team

reply:
Hi Darren, 

I'm sorry to hear you're unhappy with our Fat Llama fees. Unfortunately, we have found that the rates we charge are what is necessary to be able to maintain the platform and offer the security of thorough account verification and our Guarantee for our users' protection -- at rates for our renters that are still usually lower than traditional rental houses!

Kind regards, 
Fat Llama Team

author: Teddy
title: Dont be put off by verification.
body:
Great site. 

Don't be put off by the very thorough verification checks. They are just keeping this platform as safe and professional as possible for everyone.

Seeming as this is regular local peoples personal equiptment, Fat Llama are just making sure that they do their duty in protecting it. 

If this process annoys you, then you have likely left your rental to the absolute last minute or you are worried about authenticity of what your are using the equiptment for. 

My frustrastion was in my own lack of planning and the short timeline i needed to rent in. 

However, it depends on the value of the item, to how many additional checks they do. It felt a little invasive at the time, but really, if you not trying to do anything nefarious, then whats the issue. 

I was told this was generally for forst time renters of hight value items. In my case over 4k of camera equiptent. 

Allow for 2/3 days if you are a first time renter. 

Great communication and staff.

author: no-brit
title: disrimnatory vibe
body: The verification process reeks of a discriminatory vibe - seems if you have a nonbritish name & surname the verification process is horrendous. The amount of personal information requested is at the level of the financial institution and still, I had to undergo 2 phone interviews. Asking about details of the project I'm trying to rent kit is against any kind of sensible business practices I can imagine.  If it were not up to the fact I was desperate for a niche piece of kit I would tell them to fob off. The website messaging system glitches as well, so essentially make sure you request a kit solid few days in advance.
reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We're really sorry you had this experience on Fat Llama - We want to reassure that the verification is based on a mixture of the items value, previous professional experience (depending on what item it is) and also the type documentation provided.

We do need more time to verify people if its high value kit, as well as if its a busy period. As we have business hours, we recommend for a first time rental you allow at least 24 hours before the rental start to get verified.

We've had some really exciting new updates to the app and web that we hope you'll be happy with: https://fatllama.crisp.help/en/article/new-features-on-fat-llama-q5mfd2/

If you need any help in the future please contact us and we will be more than happy to assist.

We'd love to help out in future so don't hesitate to get in touch.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

author: David Hawkings
title: Good overall
body: The platform definitely prioritizes safety in the rental experience, which is nice, but the process takes a bit too long. ID verification could be smoother. It would better if the platform gave you the option to complete the ID verification as soon as you sign up instead of initiating it when you go to confirm a rental, when the verification then causes a delay in renting. Verification should also be instantaneous. I don't get why an agent has to review it. I've implemented online verifications using ID and facial recognition in an app and a manual review should not be necessary most of the time. It also would not let me do a same-day rental even though I had confirmed the pick up time for the equipment. Having said all that, the app worked well for my purpose.

body: Made a booking on 15 of April for 16-18  2024, they asked me to submit my ID drivers license, 3 Months statements, Invoice that is issued for the event I am renting equipment for. Conducted a 5 minute interview with verification team, contacted them on the email to follow up because I urgently need equipment, but all emails are simply ignored. And if you try to cancel order they want 40%, while the day of your booking already started on 16 and they haven't completed verification on their side. On the site they clearly state that is verification takes 10-60 minutes but that not the case.

author: anonimo
title: Don´t use this if you need professionalism.
body: Experiencing a scam from a low-quality service is disappointing and undermines trust in providers. In a world where service quality should be paramount, it's disheartening to encounter unsatisfactory experiences like mine. It's crucial to choose reliable providers and demand quality and transparency in services. I cannot recommend this service due to its lack of quality and poor customer service. Furthermore, the company seems to endorse suppliers of items who are not serious, failing to meet the information displayed in their profiles, and also expressing mistrust towards foreign clients. It's better to seek more reliable and respectable alternatives that prioritize customer satisfaction and offer an adequate level of quality and professionalism.
reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave your review.

We want to assure you we're not a scam company and have been a legitimate peer to peer rental platform since 2017. We're very sorry you had a bad experience on the platform and we'd be happy to try and rectify this if you contact us at info@fatllama.com. We put trust in our owners to provide the correct information and work in accordance with our terms. As a community based platform, we also rely on the community to report things to us directly, so we can take action and put measures in place to stop unreliable people and untrustworthy people from the platform. As well as we have a whole team dedicated to quality control and fraud prevention. 

If you have any further feedback please get in touch, we hope you feel you're able to use Fat Llama again in the future.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

title: Takes 10 years to get verified
body: Takes 10 years to get verified, all the while, they're holding your money. Really terrible service, the lender was happy, I had paid my money and over the course of several emails sent 6 (yes, six) forms of identification, to the point where it was instrusive and still they didn't verify me. I've read reviews mentioning a 10minute interrogative phone call - thankfully I cancelled before that, already 48hours into the '1 hour' verification process. Avoid.
reply:
Hi Andre,

Thank you for taking the time to leave your review.

We're really sorry you had some difficulties being verified in this case. We verify based on the value of the item and the documents given to us, and sometimes if we do not verify on this occasion we suggest renting cheaper options. We do this to protect the platform in a number of ways. Usually we do need a phone call with renters for very high value items which it may have been in this case. After the phone call things move along quite quickly. 

If you'd like to use us in future please let us know and we'd be happy to help you through the process again. Once verified for a high value item, you do not need to go through the process again.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

author: Boris Rusev
title: Total disaster when it comes to…
body:
Total disaster when it comes to paperwork 
When you rent something you go on the rental press "Invoice" button and you are provided with a proper invoice what you rent how much money you spent how much charges was deducted VAT etc.

BUT when you rent out something you are getting email that you receive some money and of course the button "Invoice" does not exist anymore 
Than comes the support who is hiding behind a made up name and every single email is made like it comes from a different person which completely refuse to cooperate and help you with whatever you are supposed to receive by LAW !!!!
I am shoked how they manage to survive so much time with such bad paperwork. 

When it comes to accounting it is just like polite version of "You got some money so you keep your head down and do not ask question we are not going to help you anyway"
reply:
Hi Boris,

Thank you for your email.

I'm sorry you were not satisfied with the typical invoices you receive from us at the time. We have since changed and updated the way we do invoices and we hope this is to your satisfaction now. It shows the VAT number, company name and address and you are able to request these at any time. 

If you have any further questions about this, feel free to email resolutions@fatllama.com.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

author: Saleel Tambe
title: This company is not even one star…
body:
This company is not even one star rating. They deserve minus ratings. Stay away from them by all means.
I contacted them on the Whats app number which they have published on the website for contact purpose. The WA reply to my message turned me back again to go the same website.  
After sending my request through the website as suggested - they rejected my request and their reply does not sound sensible at all. They rejected my request because apprantly I don't have enough reviews !!!
I don't understand whats going on .......How and why should I order something unecessary which I never need. Just for the sake of building reviews ??? Ridiculous.
I enquired only or an item which I seriously need. Happy to pay any deposit if required. But they don't understand the context. 
All in all a total horrible way of working. Not worth it.
I was very keen to work with them as I am a potential customer and these kind of things are totally detering to go with this company. 
People should go to better renting suppliers. They are more efficient and practical.

author: Kamil123
title: This company is a joke
body:
This company is a joke, I see here plenty good reviews but when the bad ones shows it's worth it as they tend to let people down. 
I've tried to rent a DJ desk for a fund raising event for a school. After endless process of verifications, emails, phone calls, more emails with more verification, anything they asked they approved the rental and charged the card. Only to cancel next day without any notice whatsoever. Nothing at all!!! If I wouldn't find out by accident in advance of the event, we would have been left without the necessary equipment for the fundraiser event. Could have probably just sing songs and hope we'd raise at least something to cover the costs. 
Anyhow, I don't care whatever excuse they will reply here, this is just not what a fair company would do without at least being up straight and letting me know that they cancelled.
reply:
Hi Kamil,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry this has happened to you.

After taking a look into your account it looks like the owner requested to cancel the item as the item was not available for those dates. We did communicate this to you and also the owner should have as well, but we're sorry if this was not received.

We'd be more than happy to help you find a new item for the dates you need. Please contact us if you'd be interested at info@fatllama.com.

Best Regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Pop
title: Great for the community, but the fees are unreasonably high!
body:
The platform is amazing and very useful among creatives and production people. However, there've been a considerable number of times when either the phone app or website would crash and I wouldn't be able to communicate with people in my inbox, the payment won't work sometimes, I would write a message and the other person replies at the same time and my message disappears, and that's been frustrating.
Lastly, they're very cheeky with their fees: charging both receiving ends 25% for service fees and charge VAT additionally too. Technically, they take the risk of covering for stolen items in case of scams (or damages during production) and do filter people out who do not seem eligible for renting, but I haven’t run into that problem yet (hopefully won’t), so I can’t say much in that regard.

Hi Keisha,

Thanks for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry you've had this experience. If you're renting something high value for the first time, we would always recommend giving 24 hours before your rental to sort everything out. As we're not like traditional rental houses, we have a unique verification process which can take a bit of time to sort if you're a first time high value renter. We put these things in place to protect the platform. We do sometimes suggest people rent things of a lower value and build their way up to renting high value things - if you need help with this, please feel free to email resolutions@fatllama.com to discuss further.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Luke
title: Zero stars
body:
Locked me into a wrong booking and sprung verification documents on me after taking me through a 5/6 step checkout & taking payment. Now screwed for a short-term shoot & can’t get my money back because they’re refusing to do so given the 48 hour window, even with the seller agreeing to cancel. The website is horrifically slow, links don’t always lead to where they say they do, and the help chat is a waste of time. Huge problem with this service is their slow & laggy website which conveniently crashes before you can get clarification on an issue. Would’ve started a ‘shop’ on here but after one trial use of the renting procedure, it’s a total total logistical and braindead nightmare.

Edit: refund approved, waiting for money to return - shouldn’t have taken any money without confirmation of documents
reply:
Hi Luke,

Thank you for your email, we're sorry this has happened to you but rightly so your refund would have been approved if you didn't want to complete the rental.

The rental process has always been to pay and then verify, it's just how the flow has always been. The verification process may be a bit longer than other rental houses if your a first time renter, but this is because we don't take any deposits or credit cards and therefore need to do a more rigorous verification. This is so we can keep your items safe, if you so chose to use us again to rent out your items.

If you'd like any further help or advice, then please don't hesitate to get in touch. We really hope you use our services again.

Best Regards,

Fat Llama

author: Chris
title: Why I gave up lending after 4 years with the platform.
body:
I have used the platform since 2018, had equipment rented over 800 times and have a flawless track record of 5* reviews (unlike Fat Llamas trust pilots reviews...).  In that time Fat Llama has taken of £15,000 of commission for my rentals.  I think its fair to say… people like myself have been core to enabling the platforms growth.  We have invested our money in equipment to stock the platform, as well as plugged gaps where the service fails to deliver (e.g. when verification is delayed, I have often had to provide free guidance to borrowers on what to do to solve the problem). 

I have experienced major issues with around 2% of rental (aroudn 1 every 6-8 weeks), and minor but notable issues / inconvenience with a further 10%- 15.   When the major issues happen, I've often found myself on the receiving end of manipulative and/or aggressive behaviour of borrowers. 

I think its fair to say... I've had a mix of both smooth and problematic transactions... I hope the following account helps anyone considering renting on the platform to go in with their eyes open to the potential for negative experiences. 

1) The platform's customer support encourages renters to attempt to resolve the issue before they are willing to step in.  Allot can happen in the time between an issue occurring and the platform are willing to intervene.   

2) Some renters can become threatening when they realise they might be charged for damage or late returns.   On one very memorable occasion when a lens was damaged, fat llamas customer care team set an invoice to a threatening borrower that contained personal details (the ICO has confirmed that this is a serious breach of GDPR and one that I need to report - and will do in due course). On another a rugby player who had borrowed a long telephoto lens, became so inebriated that he wasn't able to return the equipment and threatened that I would 'regret it' if he was charged for an extra day. 

3) lost earnings are not covered, in a recent incident a borrowers ghosted me for the best part of a month, before retiring the item. 


4) Even when a return time has been clearly agreed, around 10 - 15% of renters will treat the agreed time as more of a loose guide and return at their leisure.  At the extreme end of the spectrum.  I've had phone calls in the early hours of the morning, when a renter decided he suddenly needed to return the equipment. 

In the time I've been with the platform, I've seen the commission the platform takes for rentals more than double to around 40% (20% from the renter and 20% from borrowers).   Yet, I've experinced very little in terms of improvements in customer support in return. 

If you're thinking of using the platform to make a bit of cash on the side, I would give carful consideration to how you plan to handle the tricky renters.  There are a small percentage (the platform will gleefully tell you this), but they generate a disproportionate amount of stress and work. 

// update. 

I offered to discuss the challenges that I had experienced with the platform including the serious breach of GDPR mentioned about, I was told by their resolution team, that due to other priorities (product release) and a short staffing within there team, they would be able to make time until the new year (3 months time)
reply:
Hi Chris,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. 

We want to note that a phone conversation has happened between yourself and the company. We just wanted to also respond to this review. 

The GDPR incident which happened over a year ago has been raised with us and the people involved have been spoken to. At the time an apology was made and this was not pushed any further. We acknowledge this may still have affected you personally a year later and for that we apologise for the distress.

We never covered loss of earnings as a policy on Fat Llama. We do however continue to pursue renters for late fees and ban them from the platform until these fees are paid for. In regards to the fees rising, we raised them back in 2020 to sustain the platform and to bring all the new features, grow the team and also focus on growth to bring owners more rentals.

We hope you can still feel like you can use Fat Llama, we have also discussed in length supporting you through any difficulties so please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Best Regards,

The Fat Llama Team

author: Mateusz
title: BE AVARE!!! DO NOT RENT!!!
body:
!!!! BE AVARE BE AVARE BE AVARE BE AVARE !!!!
"Prepare yourself for an infuriating journey if you dare to rent something more valuable than a mere pen drive. Brace yourself for a series of mind-numbing verifications that seem utterly pointless. Why, you ask? Well, get ready to surrender your sanity as they demand statements, ID scans, and card details, but that's not all! They even have the audacity to invade your social media kingdom, demanding access to your precious Instagram and Facebook accounts. And as if that weren't enough, they will haunt you with bizarre phone calls, bombarding you with questions that would make even the most seasoned interrogator flinch. And guess what? You can't even call them back! Oh no, their number is strictly one-way communication, leaving you stranded and voiceless. They surely hope this will deter you from seeking any assistance.

But wait, it gets even better! Imagine a world where there is no contact number, no customer service to turn to when disaster strikes or when you need the slightest glimmer of hope. Yes, my friend, that's the reality you are faced with. A reality where your pleas fall on deaf ears and your troubles remain unresolved. Simply marvelous, isn't it?

Oh, but they have a message for you, wrapped in their patronizing tone. "We understand that the verification process can be a bit intense and really appreciate your cooperation." How dare they claim understanding when they are the architects of this absurd nightmare? They shall face the consequences, for I have reported them to the watchful eyes of the authorities and the mighty ombudsman. I question the very legality of this entire charade! And mark my words, I shall expose them as the potential scam artists they are. They now hold my card details, bank statement, and a treasure trove of personal information.

"And now for something funny. I needed to rent a camera for a wedding, and to my surprise, the rental company called me and requested that I send them an invitation to the wedding I was attending. Can you believe the absurdity of the situation?"
Its over me to be honest, strange people asking you for wedding invitation.,, maybe I should take one of you?
This is over ridiculous.

I doont even want to hear your explanation, because there is nothing to explain here.
reply:
Hi Mateusz,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review, we're sorry you've had this experience. Just a note that we have discussed this already in emails but we wanted to also respond to your review.

We understand that the verification process can be a bit intense and really appreciate your cooperation. Because we do not require cash deposits as traditional rental houses do, this does mean that our system has to have sufficient information to verify the trustworthiness of all our borrowers. This is what makes Fat Llama unique and we strive for people to have the confidence to rent on our platform.

We have a verification team who are trying to work hard to verify documents, make calls and answer chats to get rentals moving along swiftly. We therefore do not have an inbound phone line. But thank you for your feedback on this, we may consider this in the future. 

We're sorry you do not like our processes and things did not work out on this occasion.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

Specifically pre-rental evidence when it comes to damage and reporting within 24 hours of the rentals end date.

We're not an insurance company so this is why criteria needs to be met when using the Owner Guarantee. You can read more about this here: https://fat-lama-assets.s3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com/lenderguarante.pdf

If you would like any further advice, please do not hesitate to get in touch.

Regards,

Fat Llama

author: SirBelv
title: Biased verification process
body:
I’ve just had a dreadful experience. I have my own equipment and have been a customer for a few years. Needed an extra camera for a project and decided to rent for the first time. Submitted all requested docs then was informed they also needed a phone verification. Answered all questions but kept getting more that didn’t sound relevant to the verification process. The whole interview felt biased towards a rejection regardless of what answers I gave. In the end, decided to cancel as I didn’t feel valued and respected.

Disappointed

Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review, we're sorry you've had this experience.

Even as a long term renter, sometimes we need updated documents if its been a number or months or over a year since you made your account. This is so that we can keep the platform safe. We understand that the verification process can be a bit intense and really appreciate your cooperation. Because we do not require cash deposits as traditional rental houses do, this does mean that our system has to have sufficient information to verify the trustworthiness of all our borrowers. This is what makes Fat Llama unique and we strive for people to have the confidence to rent on our platform, so if you would like to discuss this further to get your account approved, we'd be happy for you to speak to one of our team about this. Please email resolutions@fatllama.com to discuss further.

Fat Llama

author: Jack Randall
title: Don’t reimburse for renter damage
body:
Even if you document all rentals with before and after pictures there’s no guarantee you will get reimbursed if the renter damages your item.
A renter returned a £200 power tool with the handle and switch snapped off, unusable afterwards. I sent clear photos of before and after to fat llama with the handle fully intact when the renter took the item (doorbell camera) yet there has still been no reimbursement for the damaged item. I’ve been continually told that nothing can be done until I get a written statement from a repair shop, yet the repair shops recommended by fat llama said they weren’t able to work on that type of item.
reply:
Hi Jack,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

Unfortunately in this case the renter claimed the item stopped working during the rental, and it's quite hard to handle these cases without evidence as to if this is a user error or an error with the item. In the end this case was satisfied and we did try and resolve the best we could. We hope you have the confidence to rent your items with us again in future.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

author: Andrea Marcovecchio
title: Is there any hope left for Fat Llama?
body:
I love Fat Llama, however sometimes you have to be cruel to be kind. Hopefully someone working there will see this earnest critique and change the way things are currently working - or as I'd rather put it, failing miserably. 

Every time I go to rent something I am stopped (for sometimes HOURS at a time) from renting by a lengthy (and comical) verification process. It's bureaucracy gone mad. 

It's not so much that I have to be verified that is the issue. It's the fact that the process is not streamlined whatsoever. It's clunky and adds too many barriers between the lender and the renter. For example, is it up to me to tell the renter that I won't be able to turn up at 15:30 as agreed because of the verification process, or is Fat Llama informing them? Who knows?

This verification process could all be done straightforwardly and seamlessly on the website, but instead you are deviated to an unhelpful customer support service and to dodgy external insurance companies to take out extra insurance, which you then have to waste time downloading all the documentation for to then upload to a separate link so that some unhelpful customer support agent can maybe, just maybe, allow you to rent a lens. A LENS, not even an Arri Alexa and thirty freelance videographers (which could perhaps be understandable). 

Anyway, PLEASE for the love of God, sort this out Fat Llama as this was once a great effortless service that is now being run into the ground by a lack of thoughtful process and a lack of tact with customer experience.
reply:
Hi Andrea,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this detailed review.

We're very sorry you've had this experience on this occasion. 
We verify each of your requests, rather than your account, therefore, depending on the value of the item you are renting we may require a little more information and documentation than we used to. On this occasion the kit you wanted to rent was a whole kit and what we would class as quite high value, and when this happens we sometimes require renters to get third party insurance. We do this to keep yourself safe and the owners items. 

If you require any further explanation or information, please email us at resolutions@fatllama.com

Best Regards,

Fat Llama

The only drawback is the pickup / drop off process when collecting and handing back multiple tools at the same time. You then need to stay in touch with several lenders at the same time and coordinate pickup / dropoff which ends up having a big time penalty when you go back and forth. For these cases I still prefer using a builders' merchant since I can just collect a bunch in one place and hand it back at the same place.

author: Jonny Sanders
title: Unjustifiable fees
body:
I have hired my camera out a handful of time through fat llama now and they have all gone smoothly. I was initially a bit shocked that they took 25% of my fee but they have to make their money somehow right? 

It was only when a friend of mine went to rent my camera via fat llama did I notice they ALSO charge the hirer 25%, now I was thinking something is up with this. 

So this company makes around 50% of the rental price of every single rental. At least they insure the equiptment though? No they don't. They offer their own "guarantee" the details of which are hidden in pages of terms and conditions where many of the links are dead and don't go to pertinent pages. God forbid what would happen if someone broke or damaged an item. 

I contacted them to ask what the justification was for such high fees on both sides and they never replied.  

I only wish there was a competing service that worked as well as Fat Llama that didn't rinse both sides for so much money. If there was i'm pretty sure everyone would jump ship.
reply:
Hi Jonny,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. Your email had been answered by us but we wanted to clarify further here regarding the fees. 

We're sorry that you feel the fees we charge are high. As we do not take any deposits from our users, our fees ensure the smooth running of the platform, the support we provide in our customer service, verifications, resolutions and security teams and for us to protect our Owners with our Owner backed guarantee. We hope you still would choose to us the platform to rent your items with us.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

title: All good, 'till its not
body:
I rent audio and video equipment. Have been for years with no issue because I've never had to deal with the resolutions team.

Everything is great until someone does not return an item and the Fat llama resolutions team is needed. 

My camera lens was basically stolen by let's say M'r x'. Initially it was a late return - he promised it would be back via messages, then would fail to show up at the times we agreed to meet. This happened multiple times - I decided to get fat llama involved - after all they always prefer if the issue is resolved privately. Resolutions say because I didn't report it in less than 24 hours it is not covered. Well sorry, Fat Llama but Mr X was promising me it would be back over and over again. Leading me on with his endless apologetic messages. So eventually I raised a ticket and was told it was too late and so I'm not covered. This is a joke seriously? It been months now, I'm the victim who has had equipment taken from me. Even resolutions are no longer keeping me updated with their attempts to reach a deal with Mr x. What a farce.

Then we have my CDJS - Rented by Mr 'R'. Failed to return a piece of my flight case rendering it useless. After a month or so of slooowww emailing back and forth at a rate of one reply every 2 days  Fat Llama are saying they can replace my flight case if I send the flight case to them . They didn't specify an address or if I would be paying for that shipment. This is a not what I call fast and efficient support guys. Its slow and painful. Like bleeding out slowly. 

I am no longer a fan and will be deleting my account as soon as I get my flight case issue resolved.

I can see that the desk is staffed by people who do not have the foresight  to get issues fixes quickly so renters can continue renting.

If someone with some actual influence over these matters wants to reach out and fix this for me then maybe ill remove this or continue with Fat Llama.
